docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG JAMES S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
